Tests the behavior of the Math.round function with Infinity as input.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.round` function when applied to the value `Infinity`. It verifies that rounding `Infinity` results in `Infinity`, which is consistent with the mathematical properties of infinity. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expression evaluates to `true`, indicating that the `Math.round` function behaves as expected in this scenario. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing specifically on the behavior of a single mathematical operation.
